user.title: gHAndalf — map your energy entities
user.description: Choose the Home Assistant entities gHAndalf should read. You can add air-quality entities and tune thresholds later via Configure. Nothing is hardcoded.

data.dehumidifier_sensors: Humidity sensors in rooms with a dehumidifier (optional)
data.dehumidifier_power_sensors: Dehumidifier plug-power sensors — paired by area (optional)

init.title: gHAndalf settings
init.description: Re-map entities or retune values. Changes apply on save.

data.dehumidifier_sensors: Humidity sensors in rooms with a dehumidifier (optional)
data.dehumidifier_power_sensors: Dehumidifier plug-power sensors — paired by area (optional)
data.humidity_off_threshold_pct: Humidity at/below which to suggest turning it off
data.dehumidifier_running_watts: Plug watts above which the dehumidifier counts as running
